lines.content: /// Invoke the detected LLM backend with a raw prompt and return the text response.
/// Uses JSON output format (for structured responses like grouping).
/// Invoke the LLM backend with text output format (for free-form markdown responses).
/// For Claude, uses `--output-format text` instead of JSON to avoid the wrapper.
/// Invoke the `claude` CLI and return the LLM response text.
/// Pipes the prompt via stdin to avoid exposing code diffs in the process table.
/// Invoke the `claude` CLI with text output format (no JSON wrapper).
/// Used for free-form responses like review summaries.
// Read stdout and stderr concurrently to avoid deadlock if stderr pipe fills up
let mut limited = stdout_pipe.take(MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES as u64);
/// Invoke `copilot --yolo` and return the LLM response text.
/// Pipes the prompt via stdin to avoid exposing code diffs in the process table.

groups.label: LLM backend plumbing
groups.description: New invoke_llm / invoke_llm_text helpers and Claude text-output variant

groups.label: Semantic grouper hardening
groups.description: Cache synchronization and error-context improvements in semantic.rs
groups.unified_diff:
diff --git a/src/grouper/semantic.rs b/src/grouper/semantic.rs
--- a/src/grouper/semantic.rs
+++ b/src/grouper/semantic.rs
@@ -15,4 +15,6 @@
+    // synchronize cache writes
+    let _lock = cache.write().await;

VERDICT.content:
### RV-1 [CRITICAL] Possible null deref in parser

The parser may dereference a null pointer when input is empty.

_src/grouper/llm.rs:42_

### RV-2 [HIGH] Race condition in cache eviction

Concurrent writes to the cache are not synchronized.

_src/grouper/semantic.rs:17_

### RV-3 [MEDIUM] Inefficient O(n²) loop

Replace with a hashmap lookup.

_src/grouper/llm.rs:88_

### RV-4 [MEDIUM] Missing error context

Wrap with `.context()` to preserve provenance.

_src/grouper/semantic.rs:33_

### RV-5 [LOW] Unused import

Remove `use std::collections::BTreeMap;`.

_src/grouper/llm.rs:3_

verdict_issues.title: Possible null deref in parser
verdict_issues.body_md: The parser may dereference a null pointer when input is empty.
